summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Terminal Translator dashboard. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% pass rate). CRITICAL frontend bug discovered causing app crashes during AI fallback scenarios.

ui_bugs.issue: TypeError: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'toFixed') - crashes when AI response doesn't include lookup_time_ms field
ui_bugs.error_details: Line in TranslationPanel.js tries to call response.data.lookup_time_ms?.toFixed(2) but AI responses don't have lookup_time_ms (only local KB responses do)

integration_issues.issue: Frontend crashes when displaying AI translation results, preventing users from seeing AI-generated explanations

passed_tests: GitHub repository analysis (stats, quality assessment, summary)
Input validation (empty text, invalid mode rejected)
Repository stats display (stars, forks, watchers, issues, contributors)
action_item_for_main_agent: URGENT: Fix TranslationPanel.js null reference bug on line ~73. Need to add null checking for lookup_time_ms field since AI responses don't include this field (only local KB responses do). Change response.data.lookup_time_ms.toFixed(2) to response.data.lookup_time_ms?.toFixed(2) or similar null-safe approach.
